infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Tripsbnb uses your location to show nearby stays, restaurants, safaris, and experiences.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Tripsbnb uses your location in the background to provide real-time navigation to your booked experiences.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Tripsbnb needs camera access to take photos for your trip memories and profile.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Tripsbnb needs photo library access to upload images for your profile and trip memories.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Tripsbnb needs microphone access for the voice-powered trip listener feature.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Tripsbnb uses your location to show nearby stays, restaurants, and experiences.

plugins.photosPermission: Tripsbnb needs access to your photos for profile and trip memories.
plugins.cameraPermission: Tripsbnb needs camera access to take photos for trip memories.
